title: Fix off-by-one binary search in ephemeral workspace

input.prompt: The workspace file bisect.py implements bisect_left but has an off-by-one bug in the upper bound so it fails on inserts at the end of the array. Fix only what is necessary so bisect_left([1,3,5], 6) returns 3 and bisect_left([1,3,5], 0) returns 0. Do not rewrite the whole file. Print DONE when finished.

metadata.mainstream_gap: Minimal surgical fix to a classic algorithm bug in a real file, not greenfield synthesis.

title: Remove mutable default argument leak in collector class

input.prompt: Fix collector.py so two independent Collector() instances do not share the same backing list. Use the standard None sentinel pattern. Keep the public API add(item) and items() unchanged. Print DONE when finished.

metadata.mainstream_gap: Stateful bug from mutable defaults; agent must edit, not just explain.

title: Redact secret in TOML without breaking unrelated keys

input.prompt: In deploy.toml, replace the api_key value with the literal REDACTED while keeping key name, quotes style, and all other lines byte-identical except that value. Print DONE when finished.

files.deploy.toml:
title = "payments-canary"
region = "ap-shenzhen"

[auth]
api_key = "sk-live-7f3a9c2e1b"
rotate_days = 30

[route]
shadow_mode = true

metadata.mainstream_gap: Precision config redaction preserving structure; beyond one-shot code generation.
